case_title: JAMES S HIPPS VS. SUSAN J DOREY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15039183), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HIPPS, JAMES S SERVED JAN-25-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOREY, SUSAN J

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-17-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-28-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-06-2015 CONTINUED TO JUN-17-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
